name: Tri Poly
explanation: A bright DCO polysynth in the Roland JX-3P lineage. Two DCOs (saw + pulse) per voice with OSC-2 -> OSC-1 cross-modulation for a metallic edge, a resonant low-pass with its own decay envelope, and a built-in chorus for the lush JX shimmer. 8-voice poly. Controls: Cutoff, Resonance, Env Amount, Cross-Mod, Chorus and Level.
